action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Sinicki, Miresse, Billings, Madison, Hysell, Emerson, Prado, Snodgrass, Neubauer, Clancy, Roe, Goodwin, Arney, Andraca, Stroud, Moore Omokunde, Bare, Fitzgerald, Kirsch, Johnson, Taylor, Palmeri, Brown, Sheehan, Stubbs and DeSmidt; 
cosponsored by Senators L. Johnson, Ratcliff, Pfaff, Wall, Spreitzer, Roys and Larson
